summary: Cloudinary Avatar Migration Testing - Iteration 16 COMPLETE. 12/12 tests PASS. All 3 avatar upload endpoints (user base64, user multipart, admin community) now upload to Cloudinary and return permanent https://res.cloudinary.com/ URLs. Avatar propagation to problems verified. Security (403 for non-admin, 401 for unauthenticated) verified. Old /api/uploads/ fallback working.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/users/me/avatar-base64: PASS - Returns Cloudinary URL with 'frikt/avatars' folder
POST /api/admin/communities/{id}/avatar: PASS - Returns Cloudinary URL with 'frikt/communities' folder
User avatarUrl persisted in profile: PASS - GET /api/auth/me returns Cloudinary URL
Avatar propagation to problems: PASS - user_avatar_url in problems contains Cloudinary URL
Old URLs fallback: PASS - GET /api/uploads/avatars/ serves static files (200 for existing files)

success_rate.frontend: N/A (React Native app - backend only testing requested)

seed_data_creation: Test users created with prefix 'TEST_cloudinary_' for multipart upload and security testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cloudinary migration complete and verified. All avatar uploads now go to Cloudinary (cloud_name: dpxdabjzy). User avatars stored in 'frikt/avatars' folder, community avatars in 'frikt/communities' folder. Old /api/uploads/ URLs still work as fallback for existing files. Admin user (karolisbudreckas92@gmail.com) has Cloudinary avatarUrl. Community 'First Community 7a3574' (id: dc5f2c0e-6ab2-488c-bb2e-abf6de068c98) has Cloudinary avatar_url.

features_verified.user_avatar_base64_cloudinary: PASS - POST /api/users/me/avatar-base64 uploads to Cloudinary, returns https://res.cloudinary.com/dpxdabjzy/image/upload/.../frikt/avatars/... URL
features_verified.user_avatar_multipart_cloudinary: PASS - POST /api/users/me/avatar uploads to Cloudinary, returns Cloudinary URL
features_verified.community_avatar_cloudinary: PASS - POST /api/admin/communities/{id}/avatar uploads to Cloudinary, returns https://res.cloudinary.com/dpxdabjzy/image/upload/.../frikt/communities/... URL
features_verified.avatar_persisted_in_user_profile: PASS - GET /api/auth/me returns avatarUrl with Cloudinary URL
features_verified.avatar_propagation_to_problems: PASS - Problems by user have user_avatar_url with Cloudinary URL
features_verified.security_non_admin_403: PASS - Non-admin users get 403 Forbidden on community avatar upload
features_verified.old_urls_fallback: PASS - /api/uploads/avatars/ static mount serves existing files with 200
